conditions.message: Reached expected number of succeeded pods
Reached expected number of succeeded pods
edge is posting ready status. AppArmor enabled

initContainers.name: artifact
args:
echo '=== CHILL Artifact Delivery ==================================='
echo 'source      : /artifact/mobilenet-v2-050.onnx'
echo 'destination : /model/model.onnx'
echo 'sha256      : 8645e5d6511cf0f78fa4a451e3bd86b3ab6b39bb5f9216ba32d2d9aebc852ee2'
echo '================================================================'
echo '[1/2] Copying model artifact...'
cp /artifact/mobilenet-v2-050.onnx /model/model.onnx
echo '[2/2] Verifying model digest...'
echo '8645e5d6511cf0f78fa4a451e3bd86b3ab6b39bb5f9216ba32d2d9aebc852ee2  /model/model.onnx' | sha256sum -c -
echo 'Artifact delivery completed.'

containers.name: subscriber
args:
set -e
# Install dependencies
apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq python3-pip curl > /dev/null 2>&1
pip3 install -q --break-system-packages requests 2>&1 || pip3 install -q requests

# Copy script and discovery config
cp /scripts/fastdds_subscriber.py /tmp/fastdds_subscriber.py
cp /scripts/fastdds_discovery.xml /tmp/fastdds_discovery.xml
chmod +x /tmp/fastdds_subscriber.py

# Source ROS2 setup
source /opt/ros/humble/setup.bash

# Run subscriber
echo "[FASTDDS-SUB] Starting Fast-DDS subscriber..."
echo "[FASTDDS-SUB] Discovery config: /tmp/fastdds_discovery.xml"
python3 /tmp/fastdds_subscriber.py
